title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
company: Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions family as a Financial Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions:
Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India Ventures Solutions!
